title: NETHERITE RENEGADE
description: Turn your Netherite Sword into a brutal 3D obsidian weapon built for PvP dominance.
body:
⚔️ NETHERITE RENEGADE | The Ultimate 3D Netherite Sword

Tired of the same flat vanilla Netherite sword?
Netherite Renegade reimagines Minecraft combat by turning your ordinary sword into a brutal, high-detail 3D weapon forged from obsidian and glowing gold.

Designed for players who want more impact in every fight — whether in PvP, survival, or cinematic gameplay.

✨ Features
⚔️ Brutal 3D Split-Blade Model
A unique custom design that gives your sword a powerful, aggressive silhouette.
🖤 High-Detail Textures
Deep obsidian black combined with sharp, glowing gold accents for maximum contrast.
⚡ PvP-Ready Visual Style
Clean and readable in combat while still looking deadly and detailed.
🔧 Optimized for 1.21.x
Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11.
🚀 Performance Friendly
High-quality visuals without impacting gameplay performance.
📌 Perfect For
PvP players who want a stronger visual presence
Dark / fantasy themed Minecraft setups
Resource pack enthusiasts looking for unique 3D weapons
Cinematic or shader gameplay
📜 Licensing

All rights reserved.
Do not re-upload, redistribute, or modify without explicit permission.
